text: A woman is walking through a busy marketplace carrying bags of vegetables.
hypothesis: A woman is shopping for food.

text: The children played soccer in the park until it started raining.
hypothesis: The children were indoors the entire day.

text: The company reported a 15% increase in quarterly revenue compared to last year.
hypothesis: The company is performing better financially than before.

text: Two men are sitting at a table in a restaurant, looking at menus.
hypothesis: The men are deciding what to order for dinner.

text: The train departed from the station at exactly 9:00 AM.
hypothesis: The train was delayed and left after 10:00 AM.

text: A group of students gathered in the library to study for their final exams.
hypothesis: Students are preparing for an academic assessment.

text: The doctor recommended that the patient rest for two weeks after the surgery.
hypothesis: The patient had a medical procedure.

text: The museum is closed on Mondays and open from 10 AM to 6 PM on other days.
hypothesis: You can visit the museum any day of the week.

hypothesis: The bridge is a relatively new construction.

text: She speaks fluent French and Spanish but has never traveled to Europe.
